description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on the ubuntu:16.04 Docker image. Define a single job named make (default stage) that executes the exact commands: apt-get update, then DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive TZ=Etc/UTC apt-get install -y texlive-full make imagemagick inkscape dia, followed by make clean and make. The job archives the build/* directory as artifacts. No services, caches, or conditional rules are specified, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
